notes: Described as Amir Tuman in S0001.
Described as Ejlal al-Dowleh in S0001.
Received Sa'ed al-Saltaneh at his father's request.
Named as sartip in the Herat campaign account.
Held rank of yavar while supporting Nabi Khan.
Promoted to sarhang after being wounded at Herat.
Described as a colonel of the Mokhberan regiment.
Described as mirpanj during the Bandar Lengeh operations.
The book identifies Aqa Jan as holding the rank of yavar.
Mohammad Shah appointed Mahmoud Khan colonel and placed his father’s forces under him.
Promoted to sartip before military service in Khorasan.
Promoted to mirpanj after returning from Russia.
